name: I-SALT Triage (Hlunga, Hlola, Ukungenelela Okusindisa Ukuphila, Ukwelashwa/Ezokuthutha)
description: Iphrothokholi ye-mass casualty triage. Okujwayelekile kwemicimbi yezingozi eziningi kuzilungiselelo zezempi nezomphakathi.
instructions: Isinyathelo 1: Ukuhlunga komhlaba wonke (ukuhamba, ukunyakazisa, ukunyakazisa). Isinyathelo sesi-2: Hlola ngokulandelana okubalulekile. Isinyathelo sesi-3: Yenza ukungenelela okusindisa impilo (lawula ukopha okukhulu, indlela yokuphefumula evulekile, ukucindezelwa kwezinaliti, izijovo ezizenzakalelayo). Isinyathelo sesi-4: Yabela isigaba.

categories.label: Owayelindelwe/Ongasekho
categories.description: Cishe ngeke uphile uma unikezwa izinsiza ezitholakalayo, noma umufi oqinisekisiwe

categories.label: Ngokushesha (T1)
categories.description: Izingozi ezisongela ukuphila, zizosinda ngokungenelela ngokushesha

categories.label: Ibambezelekile (T2)
categories.description: Ukulimala okubi kakhulu kodwa okuzinzile, kungalinda ukunakekelwa

categories.label: Okulindelekile
categories.description: Ukulimala okungenakuvinjelwa uma kunikezwe izinsiza zamanje -- ukunakekelwa kokunethezeka kuphela

pediatric.note: I-JumpSTART triage algorithm ilungisa i-SALT ezigulini zezingane. Izilinganiso zesilinganiso sokuphefumula nezinyathelo zokuhlola ziyehluka ezinganeni ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-8.

source: SALT Mass Casualty Triage (CDC/CHEMPACK), JTS CPG
